prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Renault C-Type (C7K)** 1.4L turbocharged inline-4 with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) running 1.5 bar of boost, paired with a **Tial MV-R 38mm** external wastegate and **GReddy Type-S** intercooler for sustained 300+ hp on **Motul 300V 10W-60** racing oil

Full **TWR (Tom Walkinshaw Racing) Group B-spec** suspension overhaul: **Ohlins TTX40** 2-way adjustable coilovers (800lb/in front, 600lb/in rear), **Polybush** spherical bearing control arms, and **AP Racing CP5270** 4-piston front calipers with **Ferodo DS3000** pads clamping **330mm vented rotors** (rear: **Brembo 08.5297.10** 2-piston calipers with 280mm rotors)

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **Quaife ATB LSD** (85% lock) in the **Renault UN1-015** transaxle, **Peloquin** carbon fiber clutch disc, and **Samco Sport** silicone coolant hoses (blue) with **AN-6** fittings, paired with a **Holinger RD6** sequential gearbox (optional) for sub-200ms shifts
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB-R5T** widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, custom 3-piece overfenders, and a **Rocket Bunny** duckbill rear wing) with **OEM Renault Sport** Group B-style side skirts and a **custom 3D-printed front splitter** (carbon-Kevlar hybrid) for 150kg of downforce at 160 km/h

**Recaro Sportster CS** seats (Schroth 6-point harnesses) in **Alcantara/red stitching** with a **MOMO Mod.77** suede steering wheel (320mm) and a **Defi BF** digital dash (oil temp, boost, AFR) mounted on a **Sparco Evo** quick-release hub

**Hella Rallye 3000** 7-inch Cibie headlights (H4 bulbs) with **custom LED DRL strips** integrated into the bumper, **OMP Group B-style** side-exit exhaust (3.5-inch titanium tips), and **BBS RS-GT II** 16x9 ET15 wheels (gold) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** 225/45R16 tires
